code: `int[][] dp = new int[k + 1][n + 1]; for (int i = 1; i <= k; i++) { dp[i][1] = 1; } for (int j = 1; j <= n; j++) { dp[1][j] = j; } for (int i = 2; i <= k; i++) { for (int j = 2; j <= n; j++) { dp[i][j] = Integer.MAX_VALUE; for (int x = 1; x <= j; x++) { dp[i][j] = Math.min(dp[i][j], 1 + Math.max(dp[i - 1][x - 1], dp[i][j - x])); } } } return dp[k][n];`
